_comment: Second norwegian-linguist confirm pass (2026-05-29, autopilot session 2) over the 29 sentences the corpus audit flagged as over-length-for-level / norwegian-invalid in the SEEDED (uncommitted) corpus. Applied directly to live a1/a2/b1.json. DROP = removed; RECLASSIFY = cefr_level relabelled and row moved to the target level file. KEEP rows were audit false positives (valid minimal A1 sentences / fill-in-blank where the blank removes the function word). Audit re-run after: 0 ERRORS.

drop.reason: causal subordinate clause (fordi) buries the negation concept — B1 structure
embedded interrogative subordinate (hvorfor) + past tense — B1
temporal subordinate (før) + compound past — A2/B1, not A1 preterite
two embedded subordinate clauses (at / da) — B1
temporal subordinate (da) obscures possessive-pronoun concept — B1
coordinated clause, 16 words, two perfect-tense verbs — above A2 ceiling
causal subordinate (fordi), 16 words, two comparative forms — above A2 ceiling

reclassify.reason: infinitive purpose clause (for å vokse) — A2 structure
compound clause; correct large numbers but A2 structure
present perfect + duration + adversative subordinate clause — clearly B1

noted_not_actioned.reason: fill-in-blank with 'at' subordinate clause — borderline off-level; left as WARNING (consistent with shipped B1/B2 warnings)
fill-in-blank with 'da ... bodde' subordinate — borderline off-level; left as WARNING
